company_info.overview: NVIDIA Corporation is a leading technology company known for its graphics processing units (GPUs) for gaming and professional markets, as well as its work in artificial intelligence and deep learning.

management_team.track_record: Jensen has a strong track record of driving growth and innovation within the company.
